name: Lux umbra
short_description: In "Lux Umbra" they explore a confused world. They do not know why you here are what all that has to mean and how they come here out. They are able to do themselves only ventures they gain an accident had and now strongly have headaches. But so properly also do not know it.
detailed_description:
Step into a broken world filled with mystery, fear, and unanswered questions.

In Lux Umbra, you awaken after a terrible accident with nothing but pain, fragments of memory, and a growing sense that something is deeply wrong. You do not know where you are, why you are here, or whether this place is even real.

Explore a haunting world where horror, adventure, and psychological tension blend into one unsettling experience. Wander through dark forests, abandoned towns, forgotten ruins, and eerie marshlands as you search for clues about your past and the truth behind this strange world.

Dive into a secret-filled journey where every step leads deeper into the unknown.

What Awaits You

  • Explore a large hand-crafted world full of hidden places and disturbing secrets

  • Discover notes, recordings, and mysterious documents scattered throughout the world

  • Experience a dark mix of exploration, horror, and adventure

  • Uncover fragments of your past and piece together the story

  • Enter atmospheric locations filled with tension, mystery, and danger

Gameplay

Explore a freely accessible world and uncover its many hidden corners. Search ruined locations, forgotten paths, and isolated areas for recordings, clues, and important story elements.

But be careful. You are not alone.

As you venture deeper into the world of Lux Umbra, you will encounter terrifying creatures, strange places, and disturbing discoveries. Every new area reveals more about the world around you—and about yourself.

Lux Umbra combines open exploration with horror elements, mysterious storytelling, and a constant feeling of unease.

Story

You wake up after a car accident, unable to remember who you are or what happened.

Now you find yourself trapped in a strange and hostile world that feels both unreal and frighteningly alive. Is this reality, a dream, or something far worse?

By collecting PADs, recordings, and memory fragments, you gain access to pieces of your character’s past. Every level reveals new information and brings you closer to the truth.

Will you uncover what happened to you?
Will you find a way out?
Or were you never meant to escape at all?

Atmosphere

A dark and oppressive atmosphere defines the world of Lux Umbra.

Wander through gloomy forests, mysterious towns, silent ruins, and desolate swamps while haunting music and distant sounds keep you constantly on edge. Shadows, red light, and unsettling noises in the distance create a world that feels alive, hostile, and unforgettable.

Lux Umbra is an atmospheric journey that blends exploration with horror and psychological tension.

Maps

All maps in Lux Umbra are carefully hand-crafted.

There are no randomly generated environments. Every location has been designed by the developer to deliver unique places, memorable moments, and a world filled with detail, mystery, and atmosphere.
